programme.title: Cagney Lacey
programme.desc: While Mary Beth recovers from breast surgery and mulls retirement Chris has her prized Corvette stolen but it may provide her a leg up on the sergeants exam Meanwhile an informant is murdered leaving Chris to find out the who and why

programme.title: Starsky and Hutch
programme.desc: Starsky and Hutch go undercover as Rafferty and OBrien Texas-based dealers looking to make a five-kilo heroin buy from drug kingpin Danner Assisting them is Cheryl a wide-eyed country girl and one of Danners reluctant drug mules

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: When a weapon built by the Firm is stolen One of the men who stole it thinking the man who hired him is shortchanging him calls the Firm and arranges a meeting Michael sends Hawke and his people because the meeting is taking place at a Wild West Show When they get there the man who called them makes contact but before he could tell them anything is killed Hawke turns to the woman in charge for help

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A family of militia types is being hunted by a demon

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Froy continue their risky run in Tijuana confronting a strip club owner who keeps a tight grip on his vehicle and his employees Then Lou and Cousin Rob are in a case of he said- she said when a seductive young debtor calls in the police with claims of some inappropriate behavior Finally the whole Pizarro family heads to an illegal street race to get their just desserts from the man who had previously hit Lyndah with his truck but at what cost does revenge come

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: After Froy bails him out from a Tijuana prison Matt is on the warpath and somebody needs to pay Is this just the end of their business or is it also the end of their friendship Then Lou and Sonia get an order for a typical vehicle repossession Theres only one problem it belongs to somebody who is like family to them

programme.title: The Hanging Tree
programme.desc: Joseph a doctor keeps dominating peoples lives He frees a robber Rune from getting hanged; and forces his charge on him too as compensation Things change when Elizabeth enters Josephs life

programme.title: High Noon
programme.desc: A town Marshal despite the disagreements of his newlywed bride and the townspeople around him must face a gang of deadly killers alone at high noon when the gang leader an outlaw he sent up years ago arrives on the noon train

programme.title: Real McCoys S04E13
programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E13

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carol has sprained her wrist so Wilbur hires Velma a fantastic cook She even serves carrot pizzas to Ed When Velma announces that shes leaving to find a boyfriend Ed calls her on the phone and pretends to be a local secret admirer

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur hires a bumbling handyman to fix up the house in anticipation of a visit from Home Beautiful Magazine and Ed wants new shoes

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: As the second witness of a murder Lucas is asked to travel to another town to testify at the accused mans trial The catch is the only other witness has been murdered and his killer has not been identified

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas McCain is surprised when someone he once worked with Sam Morley shows up at the ranch Lucas thought Morley had died but it turns out hes a wanted man and wants Lucas to do him a favor turn him in for the 500 reward money thats available Morley desperately needs the money so his girlfriend Beth Landis can get treatment for a serious disease Lucas thinks hes on the level and decides to go along Unfortunately another cowpoke who once worked with them Hamp Ferris rides into town and is looking to collect the bounty on Morley himself

programme.title: Gunsmoke S07E22 The Gallows
programme.desc: Gunsmoke S07E22 The Gallows

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Jed Trask has been with the Sierra Mail Stage Lines for many years When a group of gunmen in the town of Latigo cuts off delivery of the goods and mail he goes after those responsible with the help of some on the Virginia City council - the Cartwrights

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: John Maxwell Avery advised the President and led powerful men in Washington Then he was discovered to be a political opportunist and a scoundrel He fled Washington and rumor has it the President helped him do it He has killed many many to keep his freedom To avert a scandal the President sends Jim and Artie the only men who can capture Avery and return him for trial

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon go undercover at a hotel to find the location of an illegal gambling operation Soon after spreading the word theyre looking for some action they are driven to a late-night game in the Hollywood Hills After the game the detectives give the location of the residence to their boss and a raid is set for the following night

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon have less than two hours to find the dog that bit a little girl five days earlier Normally treatment consists of serum injections followed by vaccine inoculations but in this case the girl is highly allergic to the anti-rabies serum and it could kill her

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble is befriended by a troubled woman who gets him a job working in a veterinary clinic Her involvement with a no-good carny worker brings him trouble and the attention of her guardian a former cop who thinks he recognizes Kimble

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: An overly energetic man appears on Nelsons boat and claims to have built a machine which can find shipwrecks by calculating where the shifting of the earths plates have moved them After a successful test run the objective is to find lost barges carrying gold! Oddly Nelson is more interested in the machine itself

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: An unattractive and unlucky actor cant get a role because of his looks His agent and girlfriend leave him But he doesnt intend to give up - he wants the role of Hamlet

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Handsome ambitious greedy Jeff Boder and his wealthy older wife Jackie Winslows cynical stepdaughter Pamela become lovers and conspire to kill Jackie using cursed voodoo-like dolls

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Married sleazy advertising executive and music producer Bob Ames finds gorgeous seductive Cathie Marks hiding in his cabin in the woods during a rainstorm Is she a dream come true or something more sinister and dangerous

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric sets out after Janos Skorzeny following the rumors of a Bigfoot sighting After a ferocious battle with a stronger werewolf Eric finds sanctuary in the home with a woman named Mary who has a strange and supernatural secret of her own

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks safe haven in a monastery but the monks there have secrets of their own In the past the werewolf Skorzeny paid a visit to the monastery and turned at least one of the monks

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick investigates the attack of a vampire novelist by one of her crazed fans

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki is terrorized by two men looking for a cursed lantern taken from them that has the power to find buried treasure

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Fredy 119
programme.desc: Fredy 119

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A good natured vampire takes a more novel approach to satisfying his blood lust with his chosen undercover employment

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa gets struck with jealousy because of Flora MacMichael and tries to take it out on her apple tree

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max is listed as dead so he can complete a mission

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Inept Max poses as a safe cracker so the Chief orders all federal bank vaults left open

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ runs afoul of Clearwaters power broker Jason T Rockman when he agrees to take Dr Winters and a group of her mental patients to a local carnival

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Ed feels sick with a cold so he demands that Wilbur buy a bed for him so that he can get a good nights rest

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Ed pesters Wilbur to have a will drawn up after he reads of a cat inheriting a large sum from her deceased owner

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan concocts a Kommandant of the Year award to distract Klink so a new Nazi rocket being stored protectively at Stalag 13 can be sabotaged

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan must reverse course when efforts to make Klink look competent before the Nazi Inspector General get the Kommandant promoted with a transfer to Berlin

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Thinking that a visiting Personnel Officer has come to appraise Binghamton for a possible promotion and transfer McHale and the 73 Crew put on a show of their very best behavior But when they discover that the real reason for the Officers visit is to appraise McHale for a possible transfer they must quickly become the most incompetent PT Crew in the South Pacific

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Binghamton needs help from Chief Urulu and his Tribe to modify the Taratupa airstrip Urulu - Angry over a bad deal with Gruber involving Navy property - Flatly refuses But after some lessons on Democracy from McHale and Parker Urulu changes his mind and drives a hard bargain with Binghamton for the services of his Tribe

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer wont rest until he helps to reunite Sergeant Carter with Miss Bunny after they had a lovers spat

programme.title: Gomer 230
programme.desc: Gomer 230

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: After somebody breaks into the supply hut everyone suspects that a killer may be on the island--except for the Skipper who thinks that it may be part of a voodoo curse

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The Skipper and Mr Howell compete for leadership on the island by being named President When the castaways cast their votes the result is surprising

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa and Luke jeopardize Kates chances to be named to a church committee when they unwittingly allow a Las Vegas gambling house to advertise on the McCoys barn

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: The Harts want to give their charity committee gourmet chocolate hearts as a thank-you but when one turns out to have been part of a smuggling operation can Jonathan and Jennifer figure out what is going on before someone tries the special chocolates from an unknown admirer

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: An old beau of Stephanies arrives at the Stratford with his new fiancée in tow--Stephanies best friend from high school

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: George joins the volunteer fire department

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Major Dad

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: After a bat bites Gilligan in the neck in a cave he is convinced that he will become a vampire and moves away to save his fellow castaways

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Mitch and Ryan head out in the ocean to a oil rig abandoned after a strange accident and find a drifting yacht with a terrified young woman aboard who says that her yacht captain was pulled off the ship by a gelatinous green sea monster which in fact was the result of the oil rig accident

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: Wheels on Meals
programme.desc: Thomas and David who own a mobile restaurant save a thief Sylvia with the help of their detective friend Moby As a result they find themselves pitted against an evil gang

programme.title: Thunderbolt and Lightfoot
programme.desc: Thunderbolt a veteran bank robber teams up with Lightfoot a young thief who saves him from a tough situation for a new and daring heist with his old gang

programme.title: Hercules 223
programme.desc: Hercules 223

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Doors makes a public appearance leading to an increase in anti-Taelon sentiment The Taelon Synod is fed up with Daan and sends Zoor in his stead

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Harrison and the team talk to a psychic woman who studied the aliens after the first invasion Meanwhile a group of aliens take over a family and travel cross country in order to awaken more aliens from hibernation

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Killer mist from the swamp attacks Houma putting residents in grave danger Arcane and Alec team up to to find an antidote while Abigail and Will hunt for a boy who may be lost in the mist Can they stop the mist before someone gets hurt

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Wills past comes back to haunt him not only in his dreams but here in his new home when a friend shows up who was involved in a robbery

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: As the Alphans are planning to explore the planet Ariel a missile attaches itself to the en route Eagle Upon returning to Alpha the missile gives the Alphans a lunar atmosphere But the joy at the possibility of making a new world out of the Moon is short lived as the moon does not enter orbit around the planet or its sun and Alpha faces destruction from the newly acquired lunar air

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: In the series pilot episode cousins Bo and Luke Duke intercept Hazzard County Sheriff Rosco P Coltranes illegal shipment of slot machines then plan to use the proceeds to donate to the Hazzard County Orphanage in Roscos name to ensure his win in an upcoming election against a corrupt opponent

programme.title: Hercules 106
programme.desc: Hercules 106

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: After one of his fellow teachers is killed on the schoolyard during a fight between two students a veteran former teacher kidnaps four troublesome students and holds them in an abandoned private school where he chains them while he forces them to read history lessons

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: An enemy agents kidnapped 2 scientists and their wives and is holding them in San Francisco He wants a third scientist who can help develop an ultimate weapon Phelps devises a plan where hell pose as the scientist being sought whilst the rest of the IM force fakes an earthquake

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A friendly country girl has a crush on Kimble and wants to help him escape on the condition she can go with him as the Sheriff and Lt Gerard close in on them

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: Pardoned after a long imprisonment for a crime he didnt commit a man has Jarrods help in adjusting to being free again The man is hired to work at the ranch and after having doubt planted by one of the hands his fear of returning to prison may lead to the death of the man who was the Prosecuting Attorney in the his case- Jarrod

programme.title: Fire Birds

programme.title: Missing in Action 2
programme.desc: Prequel to the first Missing In Action set in the early 1980s it shows the capture of Colonel Braddock during the Vietnam war in the 1970s and his captivity with other American POWs in a brutal prison camp and his plans to escape

programme.title: Missing in Action 3
programme.desc: Braddock mounts a one-man assault to free his wife and son who are still being held in a Vietnam prison camp

programme.title: Mazes and Monsters
programme.desc: Four college students become immersed in fantasy role-playing games causing tragic results; based on Rona Jaffes book

programme.title: Invincible Super Chan
programme.desc: Invincible Super Chan

programme.title: Morning Departure
programme.desc: Trouble arises when 12 men realize that only eight of them can escape from the sinking submarine that has collided with a mine left over from the war

programme.title: What A Way To Go
programme.desc: A four-time widow discusses her four marriages in which all of her husbands became incredibly rich and died prematurely because of their drive to be rich

programme.title: The Three Musketeers
programme.desc: DArtagnan and his Musketeer comrades thwart the plans of Cardinal Richelieu to usurp King Louis XIIIs power

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: An unattractive and unlucky actor cant get a role because of his looks His agent and girlfriend leave him But he doesnt intend to give up - he wants the role of Hamlet

programme.desc: Handsome ambitious greedy Jeff Boder and his wealthy older wife Jackie Winslows cynical stepdaughter Pamela become lovers and conspire to kill Jackie using cursed voodoo-like dolls

programme.desc: A good natured vampire takes a more novel approach to satisfying his blood lust with his chosen undercover employment

programme.title: Dark Night of the Scarecrow
programme.desc: In a small Southern town four vigilantes wrongfully execute a mentally-challenged man but after the court sets them free mysterious accidents begin to kill them off one by one

programme.title: Prophecy
programme.desc: A government health inspector is dispatched to assess the damage a logging company is causing to a patch of forest claimed by Native Americans and comes face to face with true terror wreaking havoc in the woods

programme.title: Wes Cravens Night Visions
programme.desc: A cop teams up with a psychic to track down a serial killer

programme.title: The Forest
programme.desc: A cannibal hermit living in the woods preys on campers and hikers for his food supply

programme.title: Attack of the Giant Leaches
programme.desc: Fear grips a nondescript city after its residents disappear mysteriously from across the town Surprisingly a gamekeeper stumbles upon the role of blood-sucking leeches behind the disappearances

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Ilies Mardhi v. Daniel Viveros.
